name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning at {{orgName}}
args.body:
Morning {{firstName}},

A quick hello before the chairs fill up. Yesterday brought a few new faces reaching out, some cleanings on the books, and the usual rhythm of folks getting comfortable with the idea of coming in.

Nothing on fire — just wanted you to have the lay of the land before the first appointment. We'll keep making it feel a little less scary, one smile at a time.

— Bright Smile Dental
